overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a historic New Orleans-style city at night during light rain. The character navigates through covered courtyards, narrow alleys, and cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, with wet reflective surfaces and French Quarter architecture featuring wrought-iron balconies and arched doorways.
